title: 100 Pcs Unbleached Parchment Paper Baking Sheets, 8x12 inch Baking Paper, Precut Non-Stick Parchment Sheets for Baking, Cooking, Grilling, Air Fryer and Steaming, Precut Silicone Baking Paper
features: ✔ PRECUT & VALUE PACKAGE: 100 pcs and each sheet is 8" x 12", you can easily pick up the food on the baking sheet by lifting parchment paper without any breaking. ur sheets well packed in one box that will be easier for you to store. CONVENIENT FOR EVERY DAILY COOKING.
✔ NATURAL, UNBLEACHED & HEALTHY MATERIAL: Made from natural wood pulp, BPA-free, Healthy and .

✔ HEAT RESISTANCE & NON STICK: Oven and microwave safe to 450℉, extra strong up to 40g/m2 .Plus, nonstick paper can easily cleaning up your oven, pan or air fryer Save your cleaning time on the dirty baking tray!

✔ MULTIPLE USES: A MUST HAVE in your kitchen for baking breads, cookies, cakes, macaroons, pizza, brioche or serve chips, bake wings, burgers, or wrap sandwich, croissant, hot dog or patty separating, etc. JUST ENJOY YOUR BAKING!
